---
name: 🚀 Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: "[FEAT] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary
<!-- A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like. -->

## Problem / Motivation
<!-- What problem does this solve? Why is this needed?
     e.g. "I'm always frustrated when..." -->

## Proposed Solution
<!-- Describe the solution you'd like. Be as specific as possible. -->

## Acceptance Criteria
<!-- How would we know this feature is done? List concrete, testable conditions. -->
- [ ] ...
- [ ] ...

## Impact & Priority

**Impact** — how much value does this add?
- [ ] 🔴 Critical — blocking a core use case
- [ ] 🟠 High — significant improvement to the experience
- [ ] 🟡 Medium — useful but not urgent
- [ ] 🟢 Low — minor enhancement or nice to have

**Priority** — when should this be tackled?
- [ ] P0 — needed immediately
- [ ] P1 — include in the next release
- [ ] P2 — schedule for a future release
- [ ] P3 — backlog / no timeline

## Additional Context
<!-- Mockups, links, related issues, or any other relevant info. -->
